agents.name: email_campaigner
agents.capability_notes: Automates campaign sequencing, subject line testing, and rule-based audience splits. Uses templated prompts and response caching.

agents.name: landing_page_gen
agents.capability_notes: Generates landing page sections, hero copy, and form components; exports to HTML/CSS or block-based CMS.

agents.name: social_publisher
agents.capability_notes: Creates post variations, schedules to major networks, and optimizes send times based on historical engagement.

agents.name: data_sync_hub
agents.capability_notes: Handles bidirectional sync with major CRMs using webhook ingestion and batched upserts.

agents.name: analytics_insights
agents.capability_notes: Builds KPI dashboards and automated weekly summaries; supports funnel and cohort views.

known_gaps.gap_notes: Requires lightweight ML ranking with feedback loop (e.g., gradient boosting or logistic regression on engagement features).
Requires workflow engine with state machine, SLA timers, and multichannel triggers.
